Persatuan Stellaron HunTer

An organization that travels between worlds hunting for Stellarons. It is unknown which Aeon bestows them with their power.

Gallery

Despite the Stellarons simply being a front for the groups real intentions, in the past, their efforts would often revolve around specific Stellarons. This changed upon the arrival of the Trailblazer

About Us

The Stellaron Hunters are a band of powerful individuals united under Elio, with the promise that each of them will fulfill their desires by following his script. They are said to work against the Interastral Peace Corporation. Due to Elio's ability to see possibilties, the group is often privy to information that would normally be impossible to obtain, such as the specific times when events will occur, or seemingly impossible butterfly effects. With this information, the group plans to set up the exact series of events required to prevent the Theory of Four Apocalypses.

Stellaron Hunter Member
Elio Kafka Blade Firefly Silver Wolf
